_comment: Components that can't or shouldn't have a tier-3 a11y test. Each entry MUST have a reason explaining why. See scripts/check/checks/desktop-svelte-a11y-coverage.go for the check. Remove entries as they become testable.

exempt.apps/desktop/src/lib/file-explorer/drag/: purely visual with aria-hidden="true"; no meaningful a11y surface for axe
exempt.apps/desktop/src/lib/file-explorer/pane/: too composed for jsdom — pulls the full app surface; tier 2 E2E covers
1000+ lines with a huge dep graph; tier 2 E2E covers
pure dispatcher — no DOM of its own
exempt.apps/desktop/src/lib/settings/sections/A: hybrid section pulling runtime status from the backend via many event listeners; tier-3-unfriendly
